name: Pad Puk Gai (Chicken w/ Bok Choy)
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Bok choy, fresh (cut into bite-sized pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, cook garlic and chicken in hot oil over medium heat for 8-10 minutes.
2. Add onions and fish sauce. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add all remaining ingredients. Stir constantly, cooking for an additional 7-8 minutes.
4. Serve hot with rice.
